memoryArtifacts.headline: Sutton, Jean  story
memoryArtifacts.description: Jean Sutton was born in 1368 in Wixoe, Suffolk, England. She had one son and one daughter with John De Peyton. She died in 1439 in Suffolk, England, at the age of 71.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Sutton於1368年出生在英國素福爾可維可時，她的父親Sir Haman Sutton26歲，母親Agnes Vavasour26歲。她於大約1406年與Sir Roger Drury結婚。她去世於1446年在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Sutton于1368年出生在英国素福爾可維可时，她的父亲Sir Haman Sutton26岁，母亲Agnes Vavasour26岁。她于大约1406年与Sir Roger Drury结婚。她去世于1446年在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Sutton was born in 1368, in Wixoe, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Haman Sutton, was 26 and her mother, Agnes Vavasour, was 26. She married Sir Roger Drury about 1406. She died in 1446, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Sutton est née en 1368, à Wixoe, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Haman Sutton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Vavasour, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Drury environ 1406. Elle est décédée en 1446, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Sutton 1368 in Wixoe, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Haman Sutton 26 und ihre Mutter Agnes Vavasour 26. Sie hat um 1406 Sir Roger Drury geheiratet. Sie starb 1446 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Sutton è nata il nel 1368 nel Wixoe, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Haman Sutton, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agnes Vavasour, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger Drury circa 1406. Morì nel 1446, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Suttonが1368年にイギリススフォルクウィクソで生まれた時，父Sir Haman Suttonは26歳，母Agnes Vavasourは26歳であった。約1406年にSir Roger Druryと結婚した。彼女は1446年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Sutton(이)가 1368년 영국 수폴크 위스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Haman Sutton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Vavasour(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1406년 Sir Roger Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1446년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Sutton nasceu em 1368, em Wixoe, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Haman Sutton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Vavasour, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Drury aproximadamente 1406. Ela faleceu em 1446, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Sutton родилась в 1368 г. в местности виксо, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Haman Sutton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Vavasour, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Drury около 1406 г. Она умерла в 1446 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Sutton nació en 1368, en Wixoe, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Haman Sutton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes Vavasour, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Roger Drury aproximadamente 1406. Murió en 1446, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
